caption: In the style of japanese anime, from One Piece, a man is standing on a white cloudy floor, behind him there is a green colorful jungle, its a sunny day, the man is wearing white sneakers, light blue pants and a long white coat, viewed from the side, the camera starts showing only his lower body and slowly pans upwards, he is standing with his back to the camera, on the left side of the frame, a very strong wind is blowing on him from behind, making his coat flatter in the wind, and blowing away gusts of white dust from the white cloud floor

caption: In the style of japanese anime, from One Piece, a closeup of a womans face, she has orange eyes, long white hair with green tips, and wearing golden loop earrings, she has a really determined look, she is looking at something behind the camera, then she starts shouting as the camera quickly zooms out to reveal her full upper body, she is holding her arms over her head, her hair is standing up in all directions from the energy she is emitting, small lightning strikes appear around her, she has two red horns on her head, and she is wearing a white traditional top with red and black accents and a huge white and purple rope tied in a tie behind her back, she is standing in a rocky landscape at night, hard lighting on her from above her

caption: In the style of japanese anime, from One Piece, In a colorful mediteranean city, a man is sitting on a wooden chair in the shade between the high houses in a narrow alleyway, he is wearing green shorts, a yellow shirt and brown sandals, his legs crossed, reading the newspaper. A little further back, a man and a boy are walking down another alleyway, above them a young child with orange hair is flying through the alleyway on a soap bubble built into a bicycle, there is a rope spanning from one window over the street into the other, lots of coloful laundry hangs on it and is slowly waving in the afternoon breeze
